query: Where to see traditional kabuki outside of Tokyo and Kyoto.
reasoning: RULE A applies: tool called without keyword='歌舞伎' filter, returning 183 records, but the cross_program_advisory block surfaces authoritative regional kabuki venues (金丸座/Kotohira, 内子座/Uchiko, 八千代座/Yamaga, 康楽館/Kosaka) with real QIDs and 重要文化財 designations. Per RULE B, single root cause is constraint failure: the 'outside Tokyo and Kyoto' constraint is unmet — 歌舞伎座 (Tokyo) and 南座 (Kyoto) appear in the same canonical_entities list as regional venues with no geographic exclusion. constraint_handling scored 3 (authoritative data, scope gap per RULE C); other dims drop at most 1.
missing_data: Geographic filtering to exclude Tokyo and Kyoto venues from the canonical_entities list; ideally the tool should have been called with keyword='歌舞伎' to narrow the 183-record result set to kabuki-specific records.
improvement_hint: When query contains an exclusion constraint (e.g. 'outside Tokyo and Kyoto'), the intent classifier or tool dispatch should pass a region_exclude parameter or post-filter canonical_entities to remove venues in the excluded areas; alternatively, route to get_traditional_arts(keyword='歌舞伎') to surface a dedicated kabuki block rather than the full 183-record arts corpus.
